title: session-clone sourcing seeder
content_approach: COPY real prod session content + best-effort PII scrub (user data-controller decision 2026-07-19; superseded the sub-agent's initial synthesize-by-construction design)

tests.flake_gate: 5/5 clean on scrub + copies-real + placeholders-filled + no-structural-PII guardrails

safety: residual re-identification risk documented + data-controller-accepted (safety.md §3.8); best-effort scrub; VPN/tailnet-scoped as the control
carry_forward: 14 pre-existing demo-stack test failures → v2.5 release close (REPEAT pattern)
notes: The session-clone seeder: copies each pinned public-anchored prod session's REAL result fan-out (feedback/transcript/submission/interview report/node-ids) + scrubs detectable PII (names/org→placeholders, emails/phones/urls redacted) + re-tenants, non-manager-played, source-pinned. Interview flags via 2 sha-pinned demopatches. A synthesize-first build was reworked to copy-real per explicit user decision (weekly-limit interruption recovered cleanly, no work lost). 0 platform edits.
